sentences.text: The bright red ball rolls quickly across the green field.
It is perfectly round and smooth.
The boy throws the ball high into the sky.
The ball bounces when it hits the ground.
Children laugh loudly while playing together.
The red color shines in the sunlight.
The game becomes exciting because everyone joins.
The clear blue sky stretches across the horizon.
White clouds move slowly above the trees.
The bright sun shines warmly in the afternoon.
Birds fly freely under the wide sky.
The blue color looks calm and peaceful.
Children lie on the grass to watch the clouds.
The sky becomes orange when the sun sets.
The yellow star shines brightly in the dark sky.
It has five sharp points.
Many stars appear when the night begins.
The sky looks beautiful after sunset.
Children watch the stars quietly.
The stars twinkle because they are far away.
The night becomes magical under the shining stars.
The tall green tree stands in the garden.
Its leaves move gently when the wind blows.
The brown trunk looks strong and thick.
Birds build nests among the branches.
The tree gives cool shade during summer.
Children sit under the tree after playing.
The garden looks fresh because of the tree.
A circle is a simple round shape.
It has no corners or edges.
The sun and moon look like circles.
The clock on the wall is round.
Children draw circles in their notebooks.
The shape is smooth and even.
Many objects around us are circular.
A square has four equal sides.
It also has four sharp corners.
The window in my room is square.
The chessboard is made of small squares.
Children practice drawing squares neatly.
The shape looks balanced and simple.
Squares are common in buildings and designs.
A triangle has three straight sides.
It has three pointed corners.
The roof of the house forms a triangle.
Pizza slices are shaped like triangles.
Children learn to draw triangles in school.
The shape looks sharp and strong.
Triangles are important in many designs.
A rectangle has four sides like a square.
Two sides are longer than the others.
Most doors and books are rectangular.
The classroom board is a large rectangle.
Children draw rectangles using rulers.
The shape looks neat and organized.
Rectangles are useful in daily life.
Colorful balloons float high in the sky.
One balloon is bright blue and shiny.
Another balloon is red and round.
Green and yellow balloons move in the wind.
Children hold the strings tightly.
The balloons look beautiful during celebrations.
Everyone smiles when they see the colors.
The rainbow appears after a light rain.
It shows many bright and beautiful colors.
Red is at the top of the rainbow.
Violet appears at the bottom.
The sky looks bright after the storm.
Children point excitedly at the rainbow.
The rainbow makes the day feel magical.
